description: fast-check fc.string() generates printable ASCII only, missing required Unicode coverage for PROP-009. The property test at feedRowEditMode.prop.test.ts:46 uses fc.string({ minLength: 0, maxLength: 200 }) which defaults to generating characters from the printable ASCII range (0x20-0x7E). PROP-009 and PROP-015 require 'Randomized string generation covering Unicode edge cases' including 'surrogate pairs, CJK, emoji, RTL characters.' The current test cannot detect false negatives for non-ASCII characters that might be incorrectly flagged as control characters.

secondaryEvidence.description: PROP-001 strategy: 'Generate random String values from a Unicode character universe'
Tier 1: 'fast-check (TypeScript): Randomized string generation covering Unicode edge cases'
